'''Lela Nalle Mayn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] who studied architecture at [[University of Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant University]]. As one of the [[Nalle triplets]] she worked for the corrupt [[Mayor/Legends|Mayor]] [[Acros-Krik]] as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] and was in the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|outbreak]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. Of the three sisters she was the only one to be [[Marriage/Legends|married]] at that time. She was also the [[Parent/Legends|mother]] of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Todra Mayn]].

==Behind the scenes==
Lela Nalle Mayn was one of three Outlander Club patrons portrayed by [[Amy Allen]] in [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']]. The name Lela Mayn is an [[Wikipedia:anagram|anagram]] of "Amy Allen." It was initially unknown whether Lela was the third Nalle triplet, but the appearance of one of the sisters in ''[[Evasive Action: Recruitment]]'' being very much like her costume in ''Attack of the Clones'' strongly suggested it. Lela Mayn's entry in [[StarWars.com]]'s [[Databank (original)|original Databank]] later confirmed that she was the third triplet, with Mayn being her married name.
